---
title: Reaching Latinx communities with algorithmic optimization for SARS-CoV-2 testing locations
date: '2023-01-01'
author: [Jake Searcy, Camille C Cioffi, Hannah F Tavalire, Elizabeth L Budd, William A Cresko, David S DeGarmo, Leslie D Leve]
publication: Prevention Science, **6**, _1249-1260_ (2023).
categories: [health,justice]
url_source: 'https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s11121-022-01478-x'
url_preprint: ''
journ: Prevention Science
issue: 6
page: "1249-1260"
year: 2023
image: 'feature.jpg'
pub_number: 8
---
